explorationLog.title: Brain Health Pilot Grant ROI
explorationLog.details: The grant program (2018-2025) funded 45 grants yielding a 15-Fold ROI in external applications. Need to showcase this in research impact metrics.

explorationLog.title: Boost 'Brains on Tap' Promotion
explorationLog.details: Community outreach program in partnership with NEOMED and Ideastream is getting great press. Should we elevate this to flagship status?

explorationLog.title: Is Podiatry Global Impact Claim still verified?
explorationLog.details: Claiming it is 'internally respected medical institution in the world' via AACPM. Need to definitively confirm this is still accurate for 2026 materials.

tasks.task: Confirm Podiatry global impact status with AACPM

recommendations.title: Focus Nursing messaging on 92% pass rate & 5 campuses
recommendations.why: Demonstrates both high academic quality and widespread regional accessibility for BSN students.

recommendations.title: Feature the Neurodiversity Research Initiative
recommendations.why: Interdisciplinary consortium aligns with our brand values of inclusive and innovative health research.

themeNotes:
# Health Facts & Figures

- Brain Health: Trauma, PTSD, Memory learning at national top levels.
- Public Health: Top 10 Online MPH via Fortune.
- Nursing: 92% NCLEX rate, #62 Best Online program nationwide.

meetingNotes.title: Health Facts and Theme Alignment
meetingNotes.summary: Reviewed 2026 statistical updates across Brain Health, College of Public Health, Nursing, and Podiatry to establish the baseline figures for current marketing.

keyMetrics: 15-Fold ROI on Brain Health Pilot Grants
